form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 3rd in a small field at Cairns 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1500m, on a wet track; 4 len behind Ready And Betta carrying 58.5kg at $2.70. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Townsville Mdn on March 31 over 1609m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind San Juan carrying 57kg at $7.50. Worth plenty of thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly bumping its outside barrier gate.
Began awkwardly. Shifted in approaching the 1000m contacting the running rail.
Laid in under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Last start ran last of 9 at Mackay 3yo Mdn on April 2 over 1200m, 12 len behind Milk Maid with 59.5kg at $20. The race before that second last of 10 at Mackay 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, slow going 11 len behind Gypsy's Daughter carrying 58kg at $21. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At debut, 6th of 15 at Townsville Mdn-Sw on February 27 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind Storm Capital carrying 56.5kg at $20. Second-up 4th of 11 at Townsville Mdn on March 31 over 1200m, slow going 3 len behind She's A Beauty with 56.5kg at $61. Heading the right way and looks ready to win.

form.formComment: Most recently couldn't go on with it; ran last of 9 at Townsville Mdn on March 15 over 1000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Nottington Prince with 54kg at $101. The race before that 3rd of 7 at Home Hill 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on February 14 over 1180m, on a slow track; nose behind Miss Kiyoshi with 57.5kg at $21. Major player on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Steadied near the 200m. Raced wide for much of the race.
Shifted out at the start crowding National Goal.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 11 at Mackay Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1300m, slow going 2.5 len behind Bold Change carrying 56.5kg at $31. The race before that settled back and ran on when 7th of 9 at Cairns Mdn-Sw on March 12 over 1250m, slow going 7 len behind Essay Wine carrying 56.5kg at $3.80. Bold showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to lay inwards when placed under pressure in the home straight.
Slow into stride. Laid inwards when under pressure over the final 200m.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months from last on the turn 6th of 8 at Mackay Mdn-Sw on April 2 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Pleasepleaseplease carrying 56.5kg at $21. Previously second-up 9th of 12 at Casterton Mdn-Sw on August 31 over 1400m, slow going 9 len behind Look At Mego carrying 57.5kg at $5. Strips fitter and should be in the mix.
